description_long: This is a classic black mortarboard graduation cap, featuring a flat, square top made of a textured fabric material. The cap is adorned with a gold tassel attached at the center, which drapes over the edge and hangs down one side. The base of the cap is a soft, rounded headpiece designed to fit snugly on the wearer's head. The fabric appears to have a subtle woven pattern, giving it a matte, slightly rough finish. The tassel is composed of multiple fine threads gathered together, providing a contrasting color and texture to the cap. This type of hat is traditionally worn during academic ceremonies and graduations.
description: A black mortarboard graduation cap with a gold tassel and a flat, square top. The cap has a textured fabric finish and a rounded base for wearing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold tassel draped over the left front corner of the flat, square top.
description_view_1: Side view with the tassel mostly lying flat on the top surface, less visible from this angle.
description_view_2: Rear view with the tassel extending toward the back right, mostly hidden from direct sight.
description_view_3: Front view with the gold tassel hanging down the right front corner, fully visible and prominent.
